_comment: Normalisation statistics for FloodPredictor LSTM input features.
_source: CWC Bihar gauge readings 2000-2024 + IMD GridPoint Rainfall 0.25deg
_format: { feature_name: [mean, std] }  — applied as (x - mean) / std

notes.day_of_year: Pre-normalised to [0,1] as (doy / 365). No z-score applied.
notes.output: Model output is z-scored gauge_level. De-normalise with gauge_level mean+std.
